extra_model_fields.implementation_notes: Preserve existing calculations and results; add new cells/sheets and reference them without changing base inputs. Validate that updated logic still yields No-Go under best-estimate conditions.
Preserve existing calculations and results; add new cells/sheets and reference them without changing base inputs. Validate that updated logic still yields No-Go under best-estimate conditions.

planned_changes: Workbook/Sensitivity: Create Sensitivity sheet with area_loss low/best/high (12/18/24%) and a worst_case Boolean/selector. Define named ranges and reference worst_case in Scenario calculations.
Workbook/Bellows: Add bellows_limit_check = measured_bp <= 3.0 barg; if false, set auto Fail and Restart = No-Go.
Workbook/Decision Logic: Make all scenario Pass/Fail and overall Restart decision formula-driven and summarized on a Summary sheet with clear status indicators.

Workbook/HAZOP: Expand HAZOP sheet columns: severity, likelihood, admin_only flag, relief_fail_link (+10 if linked case fails), independent_SIF_credit (-5), adjusted_priority, and include recommendations per node with cost, install days, and likelihood reduction.

Workbook/Recommendations: Include flare_dp_alarm ($68k, 14d, likelihood -2 for N4), PSV_clean_replace ($42k, 2d, restores area_loss=0), catalyst_barcode_interlock ($55k, 10d, likelihood -2 for N3), temporary_batch_temp_limit_145C ($6k, immediate, required_area -3.8 cm2, throughput -22%).
Workbook/Checks & Metadata: Add unit/hand-check cells for backpressure derating and clamp-to-zero; add Author, Version, Date, and a ReadMe with update instructions and input locations/units.
Workbook/Highlighting: Apply conditional formatting to flag worst_case rows, any scenario Fail, and admin-only safeguard conditions that preclude restart.
Memo/References: Add concise references to OSHA 1910.119, API 520/521, CCPS/DIERS (no proprietary text).
Memo/145C Summary: Insert a small table showing required areas before/after the 145 C limit for both runaway scenarios and state -22% throughput; ensure values match the workbook.

Memo/Roadmap: List all four recommendations with cost, install time, and expected likelihood reduction; align with workbook prioritization and explicitly state contamination lacks independent safeguard.
Exports: Regenerate summary/scenario/HAZOP renders or screenshots reflecting added checks/tables for reviewer verification.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Tighten workbook transparency and automation (sensitivity flag, bellows auto-fail, formula-driven decisions), fully tabulate HAZOP recommendations with costs/likelihood impacts, add references and metadata, and explicitly document the 145 C limit effects and -22% throughput in both artifacts to resolve minor omissions and grounding issues.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Solid No-Go decision and correct application of rules. Minor but important gaps: workbook does not visibly flag worst-case sensitivity; bellows-limit auto-fail cell not shown; HAZOP recommendations not fully tabulated with cost/install/likelihood impact; memo lacks explicit summary table tying 145 C limit to reduced required area; author/version and quick-update instructions missing. One verifier note: ensure claims like 22% throughput reduction and flare DP alarm recommendation are explicitly documented and grounded in the artifacts.
